subcodes.first_line: O thou faithful servant of the True One! I received thy letter and its contents caused the utmost joy and fragrance within me
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
